<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Validation; interface Factory { /** * Create a new Validator instance. * * @param array $data * @param array $rules * @param array $messages * @param array $attributes * @return \Illuminate\Contracts\Validation\Validator */ public function make(array $data, array $rules, array $messages = [], array $attributes = []); /** * Register a custom validator extension. * * @param string $rule * @param \Closure|string $extension * @param string|null $message * @return void */ public function extend($rule, $extension, $message = null); /** * Register a custom implicit validator extension. * * @param string $rule * @param \Closure|string $extension * @param string|null $message * @return void */ public function extendImplicit($rule, $extension, $message = null); /** * Register a custom implicit validator message replacer. * * @param string $rule * @param \Closure|string $replacer * @return void */ public function replacer($rule, $replacer); }
